title: rubus × impotens
intro: Rubus × intermedia, also known as Rubus × impotens is a hybrid blackberry species, resulting from the cross between Rubus fruticosus and Rubus idaeus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which exhibit strong antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Consuming Rubus × impotens has been associated with various health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health, reduced oxidative stress, and potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, juices, and extracts, often used as a dietary supplement to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
